narrative:
Hanover Twp township has 2,375 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.0 percentage points.
